delete_after_merge_instruction: Delete this file after the merge is completed and the colleague agent has consumed the context.

summary.intent: Help the colleague agent merge fastlife_dev into integration_web_backend without breaking admin/operator UI, observability startup, auth safety or repository agent rules.
high_level_changes: Admin/operator console startup was added to scripts/dev/start-observability.ps1.
Admin UI now has a clearer Russian local login screen and Russian top-level sections.
Admin token remains memory-only in the browser tab and is not persisted to localStorage.
Admin UI Vite proxy can follow the observability script ApiPort through VITE_ADMIN_API_TARGET.
Safe admin API errors are rendered in Russian while preserving machine-readable error codes.
Root AGENTS.md was compacted to project-level rules only; personal agent workflow preferences are intentionally omitted.

commits_to_merge.message: admin: improve operator console startup and login

merge_invariants: Do not expose /metrics, Grafana, Prometheus, Loki, Tempo, Alertmanager, OTel or exporters publicly.
Do not persist ADMIN_TOKEN in localStorage, sessionStorage, URL, logs, telemetry or test snapshots.
Admin UI must call only protected backend /admin/* and /billing/* endpoints; it must not call DB, VK, YooKassa, providers, S3 or Redis directly.
Keep backend payment truth provider-verified; do not infer successful top-up from frontend redirects.
Billing remains ledger based; no direct balance mutation.
VK Bot and Mini App must not call AI providers directly.
No secrets, auth headers, full launch params, prompts, raw PII, raw provider/payment payloads or private artifact URLs in docs/logs/UI/test snapshots.

observability_script_flags.admin_port: -AdminPort changes the local Admin UI port
observability_script_flags.api_port: -ApiPort is propagated to Admin UI through VITE_ADMIN_API_TARGET

auth_model.auth_failure_behavior: 401/403 clears in-memory token and returns the user to the login screen

payment_screen_explanation.payment_intents: Operator view of payment attempts, not a user balance screen.
payment_screen_explanation.capture_open: Intent is still open and has not been safely captured/succeeded.
payment_screen_explanation.refund_unavailable: Refund is disabled until the payment is succeeded/captured and backend policy allows it.
payment_screen_explanation.sync: Backend verifies provider state and applies the same ledger-safe path as webhook/reconciliation.
payment_screen_explanation.cancel: Backend cancels open unpaid intents when allowed.
payment_screen_explanation.needs_attention: There are stale pending intents or unprocessed provider events requiring operator review.

agents_context.root_agents_md_change: Root AGENTS.md is intentionally compacted for token economy and contains only project-level routing, invariants, context/log policy, work modes, required workflow and stop conditions.
agents_context.personal_workflow_preferences: Omitted intentionally. Do not treat local operator habits or personal Codex workflow choices as repository policy.
agents_context.merge_note: If AGENTS.md conflicts, preserve source order, core invariants, context/log policy, work modes, required workflow and stop conditions.

recommended_colleague_agent_checks_after: go test ./... if integration_web_backend contains backend changes
go vet ./... if integration_web_backend contains backend changes
known_limits: gitleaks was not available in PATH when 0cc0a7a2 was pushed from fastlife_dev.
This handoff file is temporary merge context and must be deleted after merge.
